name: Elegant Lemon Cake Roll1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 15 x 10 x 1-inch jellyroll pan with vegetable oil and line it with wax paper, also greasing and flouring the paper.
3. In a large bowl, beat egg yolks until thick and lemon-colored. Gradually add 1/4 cup sugar, stirring constantly.
4. Stir in vegetable oil and lemon extract.
5. In another bowl, beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually add 1/2 cup sugar, beating until stiff but not dry.
6. Gently fold the egg whites into the yolk mixture.
7. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt, then gradually fold this into the egg mixture.
8. Spread the batter evenly in the prepared pan.
9. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until set.
10. In a 15 x 10-inch rectangle on a towel, sift powdered sugar.
11. Remove from the pan carefully and let it cool completely on a wire rack, seam side down.
12. Roll up the cake with the sugar coating, keeping the seam side down.
13. Unroll the cake and spread half of the Creamy Lemon Filling over it without using the towel.
14. Carefully re-roll the cake, placing it seam side down on a serving plate.
15. For the filling: Combine coconut, water, and food coloring in a plastic bag; seal securely and shake well.
16. Sprinkle colored coconut over the cake roll.
17. Refrigerate for 1 to 2 hours before serving.
18. Garnish with sprigs of fresh mint.
Yield: 8 to 10 servings
